transcript: This is Paradox by Prada. Another beautiful paradox of this fragrance is that when your bottle is empty it's not finished because you can refill it. I'm going to show you how to do that now. Remove all of your lids, just unscrews. So you're going to take your refill, turn it upside down, put your finger here and here and you just twist the bottle like you're turning an on-off switch and the fragrance starts to fill your bottle. So you can see that it's full now. So then you can turn it off. Take it out. You can put my lid back on. If you buy a refill plus a bottle, it's the equivalent of three bottles. So you save 46% of plastic, 29% of plastic. If you buy a refill plus a bottle, it's the equivalent of three bottles. So you save 46% of plastic, 29% of glass, 67% of metal and 39% of cardboard. It's like, why would you throw away something this beautiful and does not need to be thrown away? And something actually that really you should be treasuring.
